productDisplayName: ADIDAS Men Zeitfrei Slide Ff Black Sandals
description: Designed with a sporty look, these adidas Zeitfrei slides are absolutely comfortable and stylish. With quick drying properties, these slides make for great footwear even in wet conditions. Slide into them and flaunt your feet with pride.UpperWide forefoot strap made of synthetic leather with a fabric lining for comfort and durability Adjustable strap for a customized Fit Grooves on the strap with branding for style Supersoft FitFoam soft comfort footbed for absolute all-day comfort Diagonal grooves on the footbed for easy draining away of waterOutsoleInjected EVA outsole for lightweight comfort Diagonal grooves with weave pattern for excellent tractionSlide careWipe dust with a damp, clean cloth Do not store in direct sunlight
